notes:
## Bug Fixes
- **Embedding context overflow fix**: Reduced default max tokens (8192→1024) and batch size (8→1) to prevent context length errors with local Ollama models
- **Token-aware context management**: Improved AI chat context handling for Ollama
- **OmniSearch**: Click search results to edit snippets directly
- **Embedding error messages**: Better error messages for image content
- **Embedding failure tracking**: Real-time language update on failures
